last_result: C112 complete. igt-r1-architecture.md written — concrete architectural design for R1 gap closure: three-component specification for DC#3 full via formally verifiable circuit claims. R1a (reference computation): modular arithmetic Grokking task (p=97, 1-layer transformer) as candidate — Fourier mechanism provides formally specifiable, apparatus-verifiable ground truth; multiple prior teams have partially characterized it. R1b (formal specification language): CIF-analog grammar for circuit claims — node types (AttentionHead, MLPNeuron, EmbeddingComponent), claim types (Implements, Causes, CircuitFor, Replaces), apparatus-computable verification conditions (activation patching, causal ablation, interchange intervention); standard primitives library for reusable components. R1c (cross-tool calibration metric): Circuit IoU + Causal Agreement Index (CAI) — quantified agreement between interpretability tools, FSC-0.143 analog threshold set by empirical data. R1–R3 dependency formalized: R1b required before AICD Phase 3 apparatus-computed validation can verify causal claims. AICD Phase 2 (reduced OA-DoF) possible with just R1a (voluntary deposition). Three-phase cryo-EM trajectory applied: R1a → Phase 2; R1a+R1b+R1c+R3 → Phase 3 (DC#3 full). interpretability-grounding-si.md updated: C111+C112 in cycle header, R1+R3 architecture refs in §9, new documents added. D4 streak: 103.
next_step: C113+ options: (a) P1 operationalization — detailed experimental design for circuit vs. behavioral replication test: what constitutes cross-lab replication for circuit-level claims, comparison cohort for behavioral benchmarks, timeline and measurability; (b) MCCF per-instantiation confidence — formal note on how IGE-MCCF eliminates independence uncertainty for physically-orthogonal instantiations; (c) network spine update — incorporate R1 architecture (C112) references alongside R3/AICD (C111) in §9; (d) R1b deep-dive — proof-of-concept circuit specification in formal grammar for modular arithmetic reference computation — demonstrate R1b is achievable before field convergence
